summary: Identified 6 duplicate DTO files in code/ root directory causing Maven compilation conflicts. All correct files with @Builder annotations exist in proper Maven structure (code/src/main/java/com/myproject/models/dtos/). The duplicate files in root directory violate Maven Standard Directory Layout and must be removed to resolve ERR-001 (Duplicate Source File Conflicts) and ERR-002 (Maven Project Structure Violation).
root_cause: Previous automated fixes (attempt 2-3) successfully added @Builder annotations to DTO classes in correct Maven location but did not remove original duplicate files from project root, causing Maven compiler to encounter duplicate class definitions.
reason: GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer tool cannot delete files - only create/update. Manual deletion required or alternative tooling needed.
next_steps: 1. Manually delete 6 duplicate DTO files from code/ root directory
2. Verify only Maven standard structure files remain (code/src/main/java/...)
3. Run 'mvn clean compile' to verify compilation success
4. Trigger new build (attempt 4) via GitHub Actions
